texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS & CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS & CONDITIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: www.themajlisresorts.com Our  rack  Rates  are  incl.  16%  VAT  and  2%  Room  levy.  In  the  event  of  any  changes  in  Government  tax,  Currency  fluctuation,  fuel surcharges or increase in operating costs beyond our control, we reserve the right to adjust rates accordingly without prior notice.
texts.text: www.themajlisresorts.com Our  rack  Rates  are  incl.  16%  VAT  and  2%  Room  levy.  In  the  event  of  any  changes  in  Government  tax,  Currency  fluctuation,  fuel surcharges or increase in operating costs beyond our control, we reserve the right to adjust rates accordingly without prior notice.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Payment Terms:
texts.text: Payment Terms:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Bookings will be considered confirmed upon receipt of a booking voucher from the tour operator.
texts.text: Bookings will be considered confirmed upon receipt of a booking voucher from the tour operator.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A 20% deposit is due for all confirmed bookings.
texts.text: A 20% deposit is due for all confirmed bookings.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full balance of payment is required 30 days prior to guests' arrival.
texts.text: Full balance of payment is required 30 days prior to guests' arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · For last minute booking, full payment is due upon confirmation.
texts.text: For last minute booking, full payment is due upon confirmation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The Majlis Lamu may, at its discretion, not honor a booking if the deposit & full payment is not received prior to arrival.
texts.text: The Majlis Lamu may, at its discretion, not honor a booking if the deposit & full payment is not received prior to arrival.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · We reserve the right to make amendments to the rates in the event of any increase in taxes, levies, statutory charges or any other input costs.
texts.text: We reserve the right to make amendments to the rates in the event of any increase in taxes, levies, statutory charges or any other input costs.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Child Policy:
texts.text: Child Policy:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children from 0 - 3 years are free of charge.
texts.text: Children from 0 - 3 years are free of charge.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children from 4 - 11 years sharing with 2 adults pay 50% of the Adult rate
texts.text: Children from 4 - 11 years sharing with 2 adults pay 50% of the Adult rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children of 4 - 11 years in their own room pay 75% of room rate (maximum 3 children)
texts.text: Children of 4 - 11 years in their own room pay 75% of room rate (maximum 3 children)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Single adult sharing with a child of 4 - 11 years, pay Single Room Rate + 50% of Adult rate (for the child)
texts.text: Single adult sharing with a child of 4 - 11 years, pay Single Room Rate + 50% of Adult rate (for the child)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation & Reduction In Numbers Policy :
texts.text: Cancellation & Reduction In Numbers Policy :

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of any cancellation or reduction in numbers made.
texts.text: In the event of any cancellation or reduction in numbers made.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Between 90 - 60 days prior to date of stay 20% of the total cost will be charged.
texts.text: Between 90 - 60 days prior to date of stay 20% of the total cost will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Between 60 - 35 days prior to date of stay 30% of the total cost will be charged.
texts.text: Between 60 - 35 days prior to date of stay 30% of the total cost will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Between 34 - 20 days prior to date of stay 50% of the total cost will be charged.
texts.text: Between 34 - 20 days prior to date of stay 50% of the total cost will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Between 19 - Arrival date ( No Show) 100% of the total cost will be charged.
texts.text: Between 19 - Arrival date ( No Show) 100% of the total cost will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · No Show will be charged @ 1 night's accommodation rate.
texts.text: No Show will be charged @ 1 night's accommodation rate.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: FESTIVESEASON:
texts.text: FESTIVESEASON:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Easter & Christmas Rates Apply
texts.text: Easter & Christmas Rates Apply

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: DEPARTURE POLICY
texts.text: DEPARTURE POLICY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check-out time is 10.00hrs, regardless of the time of arrival.
texts.text: Check-out time is 10.00hrs, regardless of the time of arrival.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Late departures after 10.30hrs will be charged at 50% of the room rate (meals excluded) unless prior arrangements have been confirmed.
texts.text: Late departures after 10.30hrs will be charged at 50% of the room rate (meals excluded) unless prior arrangements have been confirmed.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: REFUNDS:
texts.text: REFUNDS:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Should  any  client  arrive  late  or  request  an  early  departure,  no  refund  will  be  granted.  The  Majlis  will  ensure  that  all  anticipated accommodation will be available as planned, there shall be no claim of any nature against The Majlis for a refund (either in part or whole), if any accommodation is unavailable and a reasonable alternative was found - or if guests were unable to make use of the service for any reason.
texts.text: Should  any  client  arrive  late  or  request  an  early  departure,  no  refund  will  be  granted.  The  Majlis  will  ensure  that  all  anticipated accommodation will be available as planned, there shall be no claim of any nature against The Majlis for a refund (either in part or whole), if any accommodation is unavailable and a reasonable alternative was found - or if guests were unable to make use of the service for any reason.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In case of booking cancellations; we will keep a credit note against the booking, for use at a future date. (Valid for 12 months)
texts.text: In case of booking cancellations; we will keep a credit note against the booking, for use at a future date. (Valid for 12 months)

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: INSURANCES:
texts.text: INSURANCES:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All guests should take comprehensive insurance cover when paying their confirmation deposit, to cover them for cancellation, curtailment, medical expenses, personal baggage, emergency evacuation back home and money.
texts.text: All guests should take comprehensive insurance cover when paying their confirmation deposit, to cover them for cancellation, curtailment, medical expenses, personal baggage, emergency evacuation back home and money.
